creator: freebsd@shotmail.ru
text:
I said I am done, so I wont bother with a patch. I am not in agrement with your actions, and I did it to show that it takes just one person in any project to have a overall affect on the other. I will no longer have any commitment or work with the FreeBSD Project.

I have "you" to thank for that, so you may look at yourself in the mirror and know your actions made a bad effect on someone who has always wanted to make FreeBSD better but now see it as a failure in which commiters such as yourself make it a shame to be part of.
